excluded_features.rainfall_deviation_pct: ASSUMPTION: Season-end rainfall deviation is UNKNOWN at scoring time for the current season. Using prior-season value if available is an approximation. EXCLUDED from model to avoid leakage.
excluded_features.ndvi_score: ASSUMPTION: NDVI from satellite imagery at harvest is UNKNOWN at loan-application time. EXCLUDED from model to avoid leakage.
excluded_features.defaulted_in_next_12_months: CRITICAL LEAKAGE – this is a future outcome label. Including it as a feature would allow the model to directly 'see' whether the farmer defaulted, producing artificially perfect metrics that vanish at deployment. EXCLUDED.

land_area_acres.note: Land record (khasra/patta) – pre-existing at application time.

crop_type.note: Declared by farmer at application; confirmed via mandi/FPO records.

pm_kisan_status.note: PM Kisan beneficiary flag from govt DB – queryable before disbursal.
pm_kisan_status.CAUTION: May update during the loan tenure; use status as-of application date only.

historical_repayment_score.note: Credit bureau / cooperative history – computed before application.

annual_income_inr.note: Self-declared / PMFBY estimate. May require verification.

rainfall_deviation_pct.note: ASSUMPTION: Season-end rainfall deviation is UNKNOWN at scoring time for the current season. Using prior-season value if available is an approximation. EXCLUDED from model to avoid leakage.

ndvi_score.note: ASSUMPTION: NDVI from satellite imagery at harvest is UNKNOWN at loan-application time. EXCLUDED from model to avoid leakage.

defaulted_in_next_12_months.note: CRITICAL LEAKAGE – this is a future outcome label. Including it as a feature would allow the model to directly 'see' whether the farmer defaulted, producing artificially perfect metrics that vanish at deployment. EXCLUDED.
